GR8T Magazine
GR8T Magazine

# Music: Honestly Band

Eric Canto and Dalton Winters

HONESTLY is an East Coast Alternative-Pop band formed in the summer of 2019 by Eric Canto and Dalton Winters. The band features lyrics inspired by romance, heartbreak, and nostalgia. [...] New single out by @Honestly title “< Lovers” is a situation-ship anthem and is the first single released off the band’s debut-album-extended-release. The song highlights an intensely romantic and sexual relationship progressing quicker than expected, underscoring the palpable tension between partners hesitating to dive completely in. “< Lovers” underpins the exhilarating purgatory experienced when mutual desire meets hesitation: You do not know what you are, but you do not care. Being “more than friends, less than lovers” is diving into the relationship heedlessly embracing desire, indifferent to the destination.

Instagram: Honestly   
Official Website: Honestly Website
